validator_assessment.weakest_link: All agents assume battle-level 706.71 will be tested downward as inevitable, but price has been above 706.71 the entire premarket (only $0.17 away, never tested) — the tight range suggests consolidation and active buyer defense, not downside conviction, meaning the bearish thesis is planned around a scenario that hasn't been confirmed by price action yet.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: If SPY opens at or above 707.13 and holds that level for 15+ minutes into RTH, price would have reclaimed the premarket high resistance, showing buyer control and invalidating the CLEAN_BEAR ribbon narrative.

primary.condition: if SPY tests and breaks below 706.71 (premarket low) on RTH open, confirming bear pressure

secondary.condition: if SPY holds 706.71 on first retest and early buyers defend the gap-down floor

invalidation.condition: if SPY opens at or above 707.13 and holds that level for 15+ minutes into RTH
invalidation.effect: Invalidates CLEAN_BEAR ribbon narrative — price would reclaim premarket high resistance, confirming buyer control. Opens door to 708.0 and potentially 712.39 Carry. Entire bearish consensus collapses to no_trade or bullish.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests battle level 706.71 within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET), with BEAR ribbon and gap-down momentum driving a flush below it toward 705.76
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 706.71 before 10:30 ET, instead trading above 707.13 and establishing it as new intraday support

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains elevated at or above 17.50 through noon ET (12:00 ET), sustaining the MID risk-off regime and keeping intraday put premium elevated
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 17.50 by 10:00 ET, indicating overnight fear spike was transient noise rather than a sustained macro regime shift

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (fast 707.79 below pivot 708.26 below slow 709.04, 126c spread) holds intact through the first 2 hours of RTH, with no fast EMA crossing above pivot before 11:30 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Fast EMA crosses above pivot EMA before 11:30 ET, beginning a ribbon compression that invalidates the CLEAN_BEAR structural bias

synthesis_narrative: The 4/4 specialist consensus is structurally bearish — CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (126c spread), gap-down -3.17, rising VIX +7.54% to 18.83, and energy-only sector leadership all point the same direction. The key tension is that the critical battle level (706.71, premarket low) has NOT been tested yet, and price has defended a tight $0.42 range for 1+ hour — the validator correctly flags this as active buyer defense rather than capitulation. The single most important event at market open is the first candle's relationship to 706.71: a clean break below confirms the bearish thesis and targets 705.76; a hold above 707.13 for 15+ minutes invalidates the CLEAN_BEAR structure entirely.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon 126c spread (slow 709.04 > pivot 708.26 > fast 707.79), price 138c below pivot, 3 consecutive red premarket bars with 35-47% bodies

macro.one_line: VIX +7.54% to 18.83 MID regime rising, gap-down -3.17 overnight, no today events, risk-off macro backdrop with no relief catalyst

level_thesis.one_line: battle level 706.71 (Active support ★★) untested but imminent; secondary scenario flush to 705.76 on break; BEAR bias unconfirmed by price action until 706.71 tested

internals.one_line: narrow breadth with XLE +1.12% leading vs XLK +0.19% and XLF +0.11% flat — energy-only bounce, no broad risk-on rotation signal

validator.top_invalidation: SPY holds 707.13 for 15+ min into RTH, converting PMH to support and nullifying the CLEAN_BEAR structure; gap-and-rip pattern probability is non-trivial given tight premarket range and no intraday macro catalyst
